channel.title: sindresorhus/awesome-scifi Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-scifi Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Novels

The Murderbot Diaries (2017-) by Martha Wells [4.3]

  • All Systems Red [4.2]
  • Artificial Condition [4.3]
  • Rogue Protocol [4.4]
  • Exit Strategy [4.4]

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-scifi Oct 8th - Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
Novels

Magic 2.0 Series (2013, 2014, 2015, 2017) _by Scott Meyer_ [3.9]

  • Out of Spite, Out of Mind [3.79]

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-scifi Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Short Story Collections

I, Robot (1950) by Isaac Asimov [4.1] 🌟 🔥

  • A robot may not injure a human being or, through inaction, allow a human being to come to harm.
  • A robot must obey orders given to it by human beings except where such orders would conflict with the First Law.
  • A robot must protect its own existence as long as such protection does not conflict with the First or Second Law.

    • Novels

    Magic 2.0 Series (2013, 2014, 2015, 2017) _by Scott Meyer_ [3.9]

  • Off to Be the Wizard [3.98]
  • Spell or High Water [4.02]
  • An Unwelcome Quest [3.98]
  • Fight and Flight [3.61]

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-scifi Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Novels

Barsoom series (1912-1927) by Edgar Rice Burroughs [3.8] 🌟

  • A Princess of Mars [3.8]
  • The Gods of Mars [3.8]
  • The Warlord of Mars [3.8]
  • Thuvia, Maid of Mars [3.7]
  • The Chessmen of Mars [3.7]
  • The Master Mind of Mars [3.8]
  • A Fighting Man of Mars [3.8]
  • Swords of Mars [4.0]
  • Synthetic Men of Mars [3.8]
  • Llana of Gathol [3.7]
  • John Carter of Mars [3.8]

    • Links

  • What are your favourite sci-fi books? - Hacker News
  • Whats the best Sci-Fi novel you have ever read? - Reddit
